name: hollow ice mound
description: I'm in a hollow ice mound
hints: Inside a hollow ice mound with a treasure!
The Rigilian Ice Diamond is here - a treasure!
You can't dig through ice with a shovel.
Use SHOO MOUN with the phaser to blast your way out. The Ice Hound burrows away.

effects: Message: Ice is very smooth & hard!
Message: The Ice Hound burrows off...

notes: Hollow ice mound containing the Rigilian Ice Diamond treasure. Need phaser to escape.
